summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 7.2 — PO Amendment / Version History feature. All backend APIs and frontend UI flows working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/purchase-orders/{po_id}/amend - basic amendment (qty/price change) returns 200 with version increment
Backend: Amendment without reason returns 400 validation error
Backend: Amendment of non-existent PO returns 404
Backend: Re-approval reset when total exceeds threshold - status changes to waiting_approval
Backend: Terminal status guard - cancelled PO cannot be amended (400)
Backend: Inbound task idempotency - no duplicate tasks after amendment, expected_qty updated
Backend: Version increments correctly (v1 → v2 → v3)
Backend: Amendments array stores full snapshot + diff with changes
Backend: Timeline includes 'amended' event
Backend: Approval chain rebuilt for large totals (≥1 level, required_role=manager)
Frontend: Login and navigation to Purchase Orders view successful
Frontend: PO detail panel opens correctly with PO information
Frontend: Amend button visible and clickable for amendable POs
Frontend: Amendment modal opens with all required fields
Frontend: Re-approval warning displayed prominently in modal
Frontend: Item qty and price fields editable with current values pre-filled
Frontend: Reason field mandatory - submit button disabled when empty
Frontend: Submit button enabled when reason provided
Frontend: Amendment submission successful with success notice
Frontend: Version badge updates correctly (v2, v3) after amendment
Frontend: Version history section displays all amendments
Frontend: Amendment entries expandable to show diff details
Frontend: Changes diff shows field-by-field modifications (qty, price, total)
Frontend: Snapshot before amendment preserved with old values
Frontend: Modal closes after successful submission
Frontend: Validation - submit button disabled without reason
Frontend: Validation - submit button enabled with reason
Frontend: Validation - button disabled again when reason cleared
Frontend: Re-approval warning visible and mentions approval process

frontend_ui_tests.navigation: ✅ Successfully navigated to Purchase Orders view
frontend_ui_tests.amendment_modal: ✅ Modal opens with all required fields and warnings
frontend_ui_tests.form_validation: ✅ Reason field mandatory, submit button state correct
frontend_ui_tests.version_display: ✅ Version badge and history display correctly

owner_rules_compliance.rule_2a: ✅ ALWAYS full re-approval (warning displayed, chain rebuilt)
owner_rules_compliance.rule_3b: ✅ Partial receiving guards implemented (tested via backend)
owner_rules_compliance.rule_4a: ✅ Full snapshot + diff stored per version

test_execution_notes: Backend tests executed against public endpoint: https://wms-erp-multi-entity.preview.emergentagent.com/api
Frontend tests executed with Playwright browser automation
All test data cleaned up after execution
Screenshots captured for key UI states
POC test (test_po_amendment_poc.py) already exists with 33 passing tests
New comprehensive test suite created (test_po_amendment.py) with 29 tests
